# CI evidence record artifact

Command-owned CI evidence artifact.

- Schema JSON: [evidence-ci-record.schema.json](../../../../schema/artifacts/evidence-ci-record.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.EvidenceCIRecord`

## Root Shape

EvidenceCIRecord is the command-owned CI evidence artifact.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `kind` | `string` | yes | Kind is the evidence kind, always `ci` for this record family. |
| `plan_path` | `string` | yes | PlanPath is the archived plan path associated with the record. |
| `plan_stem` | `string` | yes | PlanStem is the durable plan stem associated with the record. |
| `provider` | `string` | no | Provider is the CI provider name when one is available. |
| `reason` | `string` | no | Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record. |
| `record_id` | `string` | yes | RecordID is the stable identifier of the evidence record. |
| `recorded_at` | `string` | yes | RecordedAt is the record creation timestamp. |
| `revision` | `integer` | yes | Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the record. |
| `status` | `string` | yes | Status is the CI result status. |
| `url` | `string` | no | URL is the CI run URL when one is available. |

## Definitions

## EvidenceCIRecord

EvidenceCIRecord is the command-owned CI evidence artifact.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
